name: Security Rule Created or Deleted (Azure)
notes: This rule triggers when a security rule is created or deleted by a low privileged user. This can indicate an attacker creating or deleting a security rule to either grant access or deny access to a virtual machine or resource.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Azure Platform
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Delete Activity Attempted, Audit.Update Activity Attempted, Audit.Create Activity Attempted
when the event matches "Security Rule" IS NOT NULL AQL filter query
when any of Username, Target Username (custom), User ID (custom) are contained in any of Low Privilege Role Names - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY Security Rule Created or Deleted (Azure) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Azure Platform
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Delete Activity Attempted, Audit.Update Activity Attempted, Audit.Create Activity Attempted
AND when the event matches "Security Rule" IS NOT NULL AQL filter query
AND when any of Username, Target Username (custom), User ID (custom) are contained in any of Low Privilege Role Names - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: Security Rule Created or Deleted

Event description: Detects when a security rule is created or deleted by a low privileged user. This can indicate an attacker creating or deleting a security rule to either grant access or deny access to a virtual machine or resource.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
